key.name: panel-position
key.description: Where the indicator appears in the top bar (left, center, or right).

key.name: panel-position-offset
key.description: Fine-tune the indicator position within the chosen panel box. Use positive values to shift right/down and negative to shift left/up relative to other extensions.

key.name: show-app-name
key.description: Whether to display the focused application name.

key.name: show-ram-usage
key.description: Whether to display the RAM usage value.

key.name: show-cpu-usage
key.description: Whether to display the CPU usage percentage of the focused application.

key.name: show-ram-percentage
key.description: Whether to display RAM usage as a percentage of total system memory.

key.name: memory-unit
key.description: How memory values are formatted: Auto (MB/GB), Always MB, or Always GB.

key.name: separator-style
key.description: How display elements are separated in the panel: space, bullet (•), or pipe (|).

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often the indicator updates, in seconds (1–10).

key.name: compact-mode
key.description: Use a more compact display with less padding.

key.name: colored-warning
key.description: Turn the label red when RAM usage exceeds the warning threshold.

key.name: ram-warning-threshold
key.description: RAM usage threshold in GB above which the label turns red.
